REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEMURRER TO AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED WITH FINAL LEAVE TO AMEND. THE COURT HAS PREVIOUSLY ORDERED THE PLAINTIFF TO ALLEGE FACTS TO SUPPORT EACH ELEMENT OF EACH CAUSE OF ACTION IS A RESULT OF THE PRIOR DEMURRER. PLAINTIFF CHOSE TO NOT MAKE ANY ADDITIONAL FACTUAL ALLEGATIONS IN THE OPERATIVE COMPLAINT. PLAINTIFF SHALL HAVE 30 DAYS FROM NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER TO ALLEGE FACTS, INCLUDING FACTS ADDRESSING STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS AND LACHES. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B) JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2026 Continued To Jul-22-26 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Under Ccp Section 128.5 Of Defendants Jun Ming Yu And Christine Yu Trustees Of The Yu Family Trust
Off Calendar Apr-03-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

William Lynn; 510-625-0100; Fried, Williams & Grice Conner LLP, counsel for defendants appearing via Zoom.
No other appearances.

Mr. Lynn contests the courts tentative ruling. He informs the court that a supplemental declaration has been filed. The declaration was filed late(same day as the hearing). No authority was given regarding the late filing. Mr. Lynn requests the court to consider the late filings or a possible continuance. Not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JUN YU TRUSTEES OF THE YU FAMILY TRUST, CHRISTINE YU Notice Of Motion And Motion For Sanctions Under Ccp Section 128.5 Of Defendants Jun Ming Yu And Christine Yu Trustees Of The Yu Family Trust is DENIED. Moving party failed to provide evidence of compliance with safe harbor provision.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b)
Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-03-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

William Lynn; 510-625-0100; Fried, Williams & Grice Conner LLP, counsel for defendants appearing via Zoom.
No other appearances.

Not contested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT JUN YU TRUSTEES OF THE YU FAMILY TRUST, CHRISTINE YU DEMURRER to Amended COMPLAINT
is SUSTAINED with final leave to amend. The Court has previously ordered the Plaintiff to allege facts to support each element of each cause of action is a result of the prior demurrer. Plaintiff chose to not make any additional factual allegations in the operative complaint. Plaintiff shall have 30 days from notice of entry of order to allege facts, including facts addressing statute of limitations and laches.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b)
Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)
